Name: Active
description: The candidate is mid-pipeline; no terminal outcome has been set yet. Default value while an Application is in progress.

Name: Placed
description: The candidate accepted an offer and the requisition is filled by them. Requires a corresponding Placement record.

Name: Rejected
description: The candidate was disqualified or declined by the client at some stage of the pipeline.

Name: Withdrawn
description: The candidate withdrew themselves from consideration before placement (counter-offer, change of mind, took a different role).

Name: Expired
description: The Application reached a terminal state without a placement decision because the requisition was closed or cancelled.
